titleStmt.title: SII 28.89: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 89. (A.R. No. 239 of 1913.) ADAPUR, PALLAMPET TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Ruined Īśvara temple, north wall, left of entrance.

It appears that the date portion of the text of the inscription was intended to read: mīna-nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakshattu, daśamiyum, ṉayirrukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa but the inscriber of the record got mixed up. For, in Śaka 1205, in Mīna month, punarpūśam (.76) coincided with Sunday, (the 27th February, 1284 A.D. (śu. 10, .81))

The record states that the mahā-maṇḍapam in the temple of Papānāśam-uḍaiya-ṉayaṉār in Kāmachchōḻa-nallūr in Mēṟpākkai-ṉāḍu in Adhirājēndra-maṇḍalam was the benefaction of Kirandai[u]laga-vēḷāṉ Varantaruvāṉ Kūttāḍuvāṉ Chēdiyarāyaṉ of Tirukkachchiyūr in Ti[ru*]chcheṅguṉṟi-nāḍu in Kaḷattūr-kōṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . cakaraiyāṇṭu 1000 2 100 5 ceṉṟa subhānu saṁvatsarattu
mina ṉāyaṟṟukiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu ṉāḷ Atirājendra
maṇṭalattu meṟpākkai ṉāṭṭu kāmaccoḻanallūr Uṭaiyār
pāpānāśamuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār tirukkoyilil mahāmaṇḍapam kaḷattūr
kkoṭṭattu tiruceṅkuṉṟināṭṭu tirukkacciyūrk kirantai Ulaka
veḷāṉ varantaruvāṉ kūttāṭuvāṉ cetiyarāyaṉ taṉmam .
Digital edition of SII 28.89 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
